name: Compass Group PLC
description: World's largest contract caterer, providing food and support services to businesses, healthcare, education, sports and defence sectors globally. Revenue $46bn. Changed reporting currency from GBP to USD in FY2024.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue $46.1bn in FY2025 (+9.4%). Organic growth 10.3%. North America 65% of revenue. Net new business growth 4-5% pa. First-time outsourcing penetration still only ~50% globally. Structural tailwind from post-COVID outsourcing acceleration.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin 7.2% in FY2025 (+10bps). Targeting 8%+ long-term. Operational efficiency, procurement scale, digital tools. FCF conversion 87.8%.
assumptions.risks: Net debt $6.4bn (£5.1bn). Consumer/client spending sensitivity. Labour cost inflation. FX translation (65% USD revenue). Bolt-on M&A integration. Food safety reputational risk.
assumptions.catalyst: Outsourcing penetration growth. Margin expansion toward 8%+. Bolt-on M&A (Vermaat, Dupont Restauration). Share buybacks. Progressive dividend. Investment-grade A/A2 rated.
